Japanese Restaurant | Nagomiya Atlanta | Sushi
top of page
order online
Our Story
House of Tranquility
Nagomiya is an authentic Japanese-owned IZAKAYA that focuses on intimate dining experience in private rooms as we serve top notch sushi along with diverse tapas and craft cocktails.
As you're surrounded by abundant greenery, a Zen Garden mural, and beautiful summer colors, we hope you'll stop to take a moment and enjoy a tranquil dining experience with us here in your own Oasis in Midtown. This wish for our guests to relax and take a moment of joy led to our name Nagomiya which translates into 'House of Tranquility'.
Reservations

meta.meta_description: Nagomiya is authentic, full-service Japanese restaurant with a full bar in Midtown Atlanta. It's owned by a Japanese chef who is behind Wagaya, Wagaya Groceries and Chirori.
